specs.features:
• Guaranteed 15 or 30 second video ad
  • Guaranteed companion display banner in multiple ad sizes
  • Companion skin for Web only
specs.benefits:
• Listeners don't expect video ads on an audio-driven environment
  • Videos only play when listener is looking at the screen
  • Videos trigger when listeners skip a song, change the station or return from timeout on the Web
  • Videos play full-screen while listeners anticipate the next song
  • Delivers in a clutter-free environment for greater brand impact

specs.features:
• Guaranteed 15 or 30 second video ad
  • Guaranteed companion display banner in 300x250 only
  • Not for advertisers seeking reporting by platform, enhanced functionality or multiple ad sizes
specs.benefits:
• Runs wherever inventory is available on Web, mobile and tablet
  • Cross-platform solution for advertisers seeking mass reach or targeted reach
